query:
INSERT INTO site_settings (setting_key, setting_value, setting_type, description, updated_at) VALUES 
('reservation_notice_enabled', 'true', 'boolean', 'Enable notice banner on reservations page', NOW()),
('reservation_notice_text', 'Please note: We are fully booked on Valentine''s Day. Consider booking for Feb 15th instead!', 'text', 'Notice message displayed on reservations page', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW();
